results.name: trumpet
results.description: 🎺Tooting instrument.

results.name: trumpet blast
results.description: Instants that give +N/+0 to all your (attacking) creatures until end of turn.

results.name: trypophobia
results.description: Artwork featuring clusters of small holes or repetitive patterns that can evoke discomfort.

results.name: tsabo tavoc
results.description: A Phyrexian villain with a spidery mechanical body. Her original race is unknown.

results.name: tuck
results.description: Effects that put a spell or permanent into its owner's library.

results.name: tuck-outlet
results.description: Cards that let you put cards from your hand into your library.

results.name: tui
results.description: The moon spirit fish from Avatar: The Last Airbender.

results.name: tunneling
results.description: Creatures with power 2 or less (sometimes 3) can't be blocked. An evasion pattern found mainly in red.

results.name: turn control
results.description: Cards that make one player control another player's turn, either for the entire turn or for specific times during that turn.

results.name: turns off defender
results.description: Turn your defender into an attacker with this one weird trick!

results.name: turntable
results.description: A device for records, or a simulated device for the same turning effect.

results.name: turtle/tortoise
results.description: Turtles and tortoises.

results.name: tutor
results.description: Cards that directly search for a card from your library, and sometimes other locations as well.
